mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.addtime as addtime, a.dingdanbianhao as dingdanbianhao, a.kefanghao as kefanghao, a.fuwuleixing as fuwuleixing, a.fuwuxiangqing as fuwuxiangqing, a.fuwufeiyong as fuwufeiyong, a.beizhu as beizhu, a.dengjirenzhanghao as dengjirenzhanghao, a.dengjishijian as dengjishijian, a.chulirenzhanghao as chulirenzhanghao, a.chulishijian as chulishijian, a.zhuangtai as zhuangtai
